title: Villagers Don't Despawn
description: This datapack doesn't lets villagers despawn.
body:
## Features ✨

- User-friendly 😊
- Good compatibility ✅
- Data Pack and Mod ⚙️

## Description 📜

This datapack gives always PersistenceRequired tag to villagers to make them persistence. (If it doesn't work, please tell me.)
## Some Info ℹ️

- You can get help from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gXbxjnpg6M) or [creating an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/AlzAlz123/villagersdontrespawn/issues).
- If you for example installed 1.21.11 version of the pack to Minecraft 1.21.11 and it says it is not compatible, don't trust that message. You installed the right one. _There was a bit of problems with the version :)_
- Better use the datapack because the mod can have problems.
